info.title: git-sith
info.description: A developer-oriented Git power tool for common tasks. Because the dark side has better tools.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: git-sith: A developer-oriented Git power tool

arguments.name: templates
arguments.description: One or more template names to add (e.g., node, python, csharp)

commands.name: force-push
commands.description: Stage all changes, commit with a message, and push to remote

arguments.name: message
arguments.description: The commit message (optional - uses a random Sith quote if not provided)

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Remove a file from git history completely - this is the nuclear option

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: The file path to purge from history

arguments.name: command
arguments.description: The command to get help for
